td.t-att-class: 'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black'

t.t-value: account_invoices_c.sudo().filtered(lambda inv: any( line.product_id.categ_id.id == partner.id and line.tax_ids for line in inv.invoice_line_ids))

td.t-att-class: 'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'

td.t-att-class: 'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'
'fw-bold text-end border-top border-black' if data['form']['detailed_report'] else 'text-end'

t.t-value: account_invoices_c.sudo().filtered(lambda inv: any( partner.id in line.tax_ids.ids for line in inv.invoice_line_ids))
